Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0F00 "SUBBURNER-0F00" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Sub Burner.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added some code at $2017 (thus overwriting the JMP $2000 instruction) to check the port 2 fire button, which if detected, skips the rather long intro. If not, then the code jumps back to $2000 to continue the normal code flow.
